mnemonics.title: Allocation Methods
mnemonics.content: CLUB: Contiguous, Linked, Indexed, Block (for allocation methods)

mnemonics.title: Inode Contents
mnemonics.content: DATES: Direct pointers, Addresses, Timestamps, (file) Size

mnemonics.title: File Operations
mnemonics.content: CRUD+O: Create, Read, Update, Delete, Open/Close

acronyms.usage: Tracks open file state during operations
Abstract layer for multiple file system types

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a tree: root (inode) with branches (direct pointers) and sub-branches (indirect pointers)
Chain of blocks like train cars, each with a link to next car
Chessboard pattern where white=free, black=allocated blocks

analogies.analogy: Like plugging a USB drive into a computer - making storage available at specific port
Writing diary entries before taking action - log changes before committing
Office desk with frequently used files for quick access vs filing cabinet (disk)
